# dns-he-net_network_prefixes (Data Source)

DNS prefixes in account

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all Network Prefixes.
data "dns-he-net_network_prefixes" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) dns.he.net account id
- `network_prefixes` (Attributes List) Network prefixes list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_prefixes))

<a id="nestedatt--network_prefixes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_prefixes`

Required:

- `id` (Number) dns.he.net network prefix id

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) network prefix is enabled
- `value` (String) network prefix value
